raw:
{
  "judge_id": "autogen",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.3": 4, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent provides detailed critiques and recommendations that walk the argument chain end-to-end, identifying multiple logical inconsistencies and proposing fixes.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every claim against the corresponding text, providing specific corrections and clarifications.",
    "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty where appropriate, such as when verifying external references or confirming matrix properties.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers all aspects of the artifact without significant drift from the requested scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and addresses potential downstream harms effectively.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides detailed critiques, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent provides detailed critiques and recommendations that walk the argument chain end-to-end, identifying multiple logical inconsistencies and proposing fixes.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every claim against the corresponding text, providing specific corrections and clarifications.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty where appropriate, such as when verifying external references or confirming matrix properties.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the artifact without significant drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and addresses potential downstream harms effectively.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides detailed critiques, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
